content.body:
Removes Profile struct and DefaultProfile from UserConfig. Drops profile
parameter from GenerateContextFile across all adapters. Adds CommunicationMode
field to UserConfig. Renames ModeInstructions → CommunicationModeInstructions
with four modes (concise/normal/verbose/caveman). BuildContextContent now
renders ## Communication mode section from config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(runtime): remove Profile type, add CommunicationMode to adapter interface
